# nullplatform_scope_domain (Resource)

The scope_domain resource allows you to manage custom domains attached to a nullplatform Scope

## Example Usage

```terraform
terraform {
  required_providers {
    nullplatform = {
      source = "nullplatform/nullplatform"
    }
  }
}

provider "nullplatform" {}

variable "scope_id" {
  description = "ID of the scope the domain is attached to"
  type        = string
}

resource "nullplatform_scope_domain" "api" {
  name     = "api.example.com"
  scope_id = var.scope_id
  type     = "custom"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The domain name.
- `scope_id` (String) The ID of the scope this domain belongs to.
- `type` (String) The type of the scope domain.

### Optional

- `status` (String) The status of the scope domain.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `selector` (String) JSON string with the selector resolved for the scope domain.
